free_text: First part of work. Cd,Sb,W,Nb,Mo,Hg,U,Th data.
Cross sections of the inelastic scattering of neutrons
with energies of 0.4-1.2 MeV on medium and light nuclei
.Natural composition samples in the form of spherical
layers 30 mm thickness (inner diameter 40 mm, outer
diameter 100 mm). Samples were prepared of oxide's
powder placed in stainless-steel containers of 0.2 mm
SANs 039, 041, 057 deleted due to the data
repetition. SF3 REACTION codes in several
Subents added. INSTITUTE code CCP to FEI
were moved in REL-REF. Subent 010 was corrected.
Minor correction of free text in all Subents.
STATUS was moved in data Subents.
